Start your project

Let's build your commerce layer.

Tell us about your brand. We respond same-day and come prepared — no discovery fishing, just a focused conversation about your infrastructure.

What happens next

  1. 01
    We review your intake

    Our team reads every submission — same day, usually within a few hours.

  2. 02
    Strategy call (30 min)

    No pitch deck. We map your stack, identify gaps, and outline the plan.

  3. 03
    Proposal + timeline

    Custom scope, deliverables list, and projected milestones — delivered within 48 h.

  4. 04
    14-day sprint kickoff

    Once aligned, we start immediately. First deliverable within the first week.

We specialize in

  • Storefront engineering
  • Checkout optimization
  • Inventory & catalog ops
  • Fulfillment integration
  • Analytics & growth
  • Security & compliance
Same-day response guaranteed
No lock-in contracts
NDA on request
Dedicated account lead

© 2026 NexaLab. Systems that compound.
